title: Anathallis pidax
taxonomy: Anathallis pidax is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This orchid is a member of the genus Anathallis, which includes approximately 120 species. The family Orchidaceae is the largest family of flowering plants, comprising over 30,000 known species. Anathallis pidax is native to South America, where it can be found in various habitats, including tropical forests and grasslands. The classification of Anathallis pidax reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.

This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties.
